${modID}:EncrustedSpyglass.NAME: Encrusted Spyglass
${modID}:EncrustedSpyglass.FLAVOR: The shine has been worn away from centuries of sitting at the bottom of the sea.
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of combat, summon 1 #yBarnacle.

${modID}:EnchantedSpyglass.NAME: Enchanted Spyglass
${modID}:EnchantedSpyglass.FLAVOR: The shimmering light shoots out wisps as it dances along the metal.

${modID}:BleedingCoral.NAME: Bleeding Coral
${modID}:BleedingCoral.FLAVOR: Blood pours out of every crevice, pooling at your feet slowly.
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of combat, summon 1 #yBarnacle.

${modID}:SinkingShip.NAME: Sinking Ship
${modID}:SinkingShip.FLAVOR: ...and you are going down with it.
DESCRIPTIONS: At the start of your turn, #ySubmerge #b3 [REMOVE_SPACE], then increase this by #b1 for the rest of combat.

${modID}:SingingGlass.NAME: Singing Glass
${modID}:SingingGlass.FLAVOR: When you press the beads together, they produce a wonderful hum.

${modID}:TitaniumAnchor.NAME: Titanium Anchor
${modID}:TitaniumAnchor.FLAVOR: Lighter and sharper than your rusty weapon.
DESCRIPTIONS: Your cards can be #ySunken to deal #b2 damage to ALL enemies.

${modID}:BottleOfRum.NAME: Bottle of Rum
${modID}:BottleOfRum.FLAVOR: "Utterly rancid. How could anyone drink this?" - Ranwid
DESCRIPTIONS: The first time you #ySubmerge each combat, #ySubmerge #b3 [REMOVE_SPACE].

${modID}:CorrodedSextant.NAME: Corroded Sextant
${modID}:CorrodedSextant.FLAVOR: A navigation tool used by sailors before modern technology. This one has seen better days.
